reviews.comment:
Bien ubicado,  me parece que debe mejorar la limpieza de baños y en general.  Buen café ☕

(Translated by Google)
Well located, but I think they need to improve the cleanliness of the bathrooms and the overall cleanliness. Good coffee ☕
